ddls:
CREATE TABLE "lifestyle_data" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user associated with this record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the data was recorded */,
  "amount" INTEGER /* Amount of a specific dietary item consumed */,
  "dietary_item" TEXT /* Name of the dietary item */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the individual */,
  "days" INTEGER /* Number of days of physical activity in a given period */,
  "exercise_type" TEXT /* Type of physical activity */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of physical activity in minutes */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the activity took place */,
  "cups" INTEGER /* Cups of beverages consumed */,
  "mood" TEXT /* Mood of the individual */,
  "sleep_quality" TEXT /* Quality of sleep */,
  "stress_level" TEXT /* Level of stress */,
  "income" INTEGER /* Income level of the individual */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lifestyle_data_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the user registered for the study */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Emergency contact information */,
  "consent" INTEGER /* Consent status for data usage */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the system (e.g., researcher, health professional) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health metric record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user associated with these health metrics */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the health metrics were recorded */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the user in kilograms */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the user in meters */,
  "blood_pressure" TEXT /* Blood pressure reading of the user */,
  "bmi" REAL /* Body Mass Index (BMI) of the user */,
  "heart_rate" INTEGER /* Resting heart rate of the user */,
  "cholesterol_level" INTEGER /* Cholesterol level of the user */,
  "blood_glucose_level" INTEGER /* Blood glucose level of the user */,
  "smoking_status" TEXT /* Smoking status of the user */,
  "alcohol_consumption" TEXT /* Frequency of alcohol consumption */,
  "allergies" TEXT /* Any known allergies */,
  "medical_conditions" TEXT /* Any existing medical conditions */,
  "medications" TEXT /* Any medications being taken */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_metrics_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for the user associated with this record
Date when the data was recorded
